name: Peppered Channa Dip (Thecha)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pickled hot pepper rings, drained and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and crisp Iceberg lettuce leaves.
2. Garnish with parsley sprigs.
3. Beat channa, minced shallot, hot peppers, garlic salt, and wine (if using) in a medium-size bowl until well mixed.
4. If made ahead, cover and refrigerate. May be made 1 day in advance.
5. To serve, mound on a plate lined with lettuce leaves.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
PER 1/4 CUP: 135 calories, 9 g protein, 29 carbohydrate, 10 g fat (6 g saturated), cholesterol (not available), 152 mg sodium, 0 g fiber.
